changes: Maim: Combo potency has been increased from 300 to 320.
Storm's Path: Combo potency has been increased from 380 to 420.
Storm's Eye: Combo potency has been increased from 380 to 420.
Grit: Increased enmity effect now applies to attacks dealt by Living Shadow.

Riddle of Earth: The effects of this action have been completely revamped. Riddle of Earth now grants 3 stacks of Riddle of Earth, each stack reducing damage taken by 10% and nullifying all action direction requirements for 10s. Maximum charges: 3. Effect ends when time expires or upon execution of three weaponskills.
Fang and Claw: Potency has been increased from 330 to 340. Potency when executed from a target's flank has been increased from 370 to 380.
Wheeling Thrust: Potency has been increased from 330 to 340. Potency when executed from a target's rear has been increased from 370 to 380.
Lance Mastery: Increase to Fang and Claw and Wheeling Thrust potency has been changed from 100 to 110.
Succor: MP cost has been reduced from 1,100 to 1,000.
Nascent Flash: Now reduces damage taken by 10%.
Tornado Kick: Potency has been increased from 1,600 to 2,000.
Life Surge: The additional effect "Absorbs 100% of damage dealt as HP" has been removed.
Life Surge: Maximum charges have been increased from 1 to 2.
Trick Attack: Increase to target's damage taken has been reduced from 15% to 10%.
Temperance: Increase to damage dealt and healing potency has been reduced from 25% to 20%.

new_content.name: Konogg, Alone
new_content.description: Chronicles of a New Era quest.

new_content.name: Brave New World
new_content.description: Chronicles of a New Era quest.

new_content.name: Duty in the Sky with Diamond
new_content.description: Chronicles of a New Era quest.

new_content.name: PlayStation 5 Open Beta
new_content.description: Eligible players can take part in the open beta test for PlayStation 5.

new_content.name: Fêtes
new_content.description: Large-scale games held at regular intervals to celebrate the completion of the Firmament.

new_content.name: Notoriety
new_content.description: A new parameter at the Bozjan southern front that influences a player's chances of being selected to duel enemies.

new_content.name: Explorer Mode
new_content.description: Expansion of supported duties allowing level sync and item level sync to be removed.

housing.name: Small Forge's Walls
housing.description: A set of four walls designed for those who wish to transform their estate into a forge. ※Can only be used with cottages on small plots of land.

housing.name: Medium Forge's Walls
housing.description: A set of four walls designed for those who wish to transform their estate into a forge. ※Can only be used with houses on medium plots of land.

housing.name: Large Forge's Walls
housing.description: A set of four walls designed for those who wish to transform their estate into a forge. ※Can only be used with mansions on large plots of land.

housing.name: Storm Blue Interior Wall
housing.description: A blue interior wall for those estate owners who wish to make a simple statement.

housing.name: Cream Yellow Carpet
housing.description: Durable-yet-fuzzy loop carpet in a cozy cream yellow.

housing.name: Cloud Acorn Chandelier
housing.description: "Quaint" does not begin to describe this chandelier made with cloud acorns still hanging on the branch.

housing.name: Forging Bench
housing.description: An outdoor furnishing perfect for those who prefer to do their smithing out in the open.

housing.name: Garden Anvil
housing.description: Best placed outdoors, as it tends to leave rather an undesirable impression on all but the most durable of floors.

housing.name: Materiel Table
housing.description: An outdoor furnishing including an assortment of arms and armor.

housing.name: Fête Party Balloons
housing.description: Seen adorning the Firmament during the Skyrise Celebration, this colorful bunch of balloons is guaranteed to fill the air with festive cheer.

housing.name: Fête Skyrise Balloon
housing.description: Seen adorning the Firmament during the Skyrise Celebration, this oversized balloon set upon an elegant mount brings a touch of sophistication to any festive occasion.

housing.name: Azim Steppe Phasmascape
housing.description: This advanced magitek contraption displays the wide, sweeping landscape of the Azim Steppe in vivid detail.

housing.name: Blue Moon Phasmascape
housing.description: This advanced magitek contraption displays a full moon hanging majestically in the night sky.

housing.name: Windowed Partition
housing.description: Extending to the ceiling, this partition incorporates a wide rectangular window.

housing.name: Hingan Windowed Partition
housing.description: Extending to the ceiling, this partition incorporates a round Hingan-style window.

housing.name: Country Dining Set
housing.description: Enjoy the bucolic life with this wooden dining set for four, finished with a checkered tablecloth.

housing.name: Red Brick Counter
housing.description: For years, academics have sought to explain why such counters of brick and timber enhance the flavor of liquor.

housing.name: Back Bar
housing.description: A tall wooden shelf commonly used in taverns to store and display liquor.

housing.name: Major-General Cushion
housing.description: It's a shark. With legs. And is also a cushion.

housing.name: Diamond Weapon Bust
housing.description: Arguably more shoulders than bust, but undeniably menacing in either case.

housing.name: Stuffed Android Units
housing.description: As they stood together as comrades, it is only fitting that 2B and 9S stand together as stuffed toys.

housing.name: Wooden Reel Table
housing.description: Formerly used to carry ropes and cables, this wooden reel has been repurposed as a table.

housing.name: Violin Showcase
housing.description: A wooden cabinet custom made for displaying violins. Comes complete with instruments.

housing.name: Pub Signboard
housing.description: When it comes to indicating the presence of a pub, nary a word is needed.

housing.name: Mushroom Lamp
housing.description: Grown from a ball of moss, this luminescent mushroom gives off a gentle light.

housing.name: Sealed Letter
housing.description: While the contents are a mystery, whoever reads this letter is certain to regret it for the rest of their days.

housing.name: Approved Ishgardian Lunch
housing.description: Tasty and wholesome, this lunch set is said to be a favorite among skybuilders.

housing.name: Akadaemia Prospectuses
housing.description: This collection of brochures provides detailed information to prospective students of the Akadaemia Anyder.

housing.name: Ice Box
housing.description: Rather than with magic or magitek, this wooden box keeps its contents chilled the old-fashioned way─with a large block of ice.

housing.name: Necrologos Transcription
housing.description: While appearing to be gibberish, the words written within this tome fiendishly incorporate a summoning spell.

housing.name: Hand-poured Coffee
housing.description: Aromatic coffee brewed by the time-honored pour-over method.

housing.name: Pixie Apple Basket
housing.description: A basket of pixie apples and a bottle of grape juice, perfect as a palate cleanser or simply a snack.

housing.name: Armor Hanger
housing.description: Originally designed for ceremonial purposes for those of the Elezen persuasion.

housing.name: G-Warrior MG
housing.description: A dynamic tabletop statue based on Garlond Ironworks' G-Warrior.

housing.name: Bar Rack
housing.description: A wooden rack for holding a selection of drinks and glasses.

housing.name: Portrait of Gestahl
housing.description: A beautiful rendering of a sweet little dog who somehow exudes the air of a tyrannical emperor.

housing.name: Mounted Dinosaur Skull
housing.description: The cranium of this ferocious predator is now doomed to spend eternity in ignominy mounted as a trophy.

glamour.name: Peacelover's Attire Coffer
glamour.description: A banded chest containing a complete set of peacelover's attire.
